skills.success_receipt: Focused tests/analyzer pass, relevant scanners run, generated artifacts refreshed, and audit registry pass stamped.
known_failure_modes: Refactor starts from ad hoc files instead of registry/scanner output.
Generated Dart, design, Widgetbook, or tool metadata is left stale.
Feature boundaries are moved without updating app architecture docs.
Repeated migration work proceeds without a reference exhibit and pattern-adoption tracker update.

skills.success_receipt: Subagent work is isolated in disposable Git branches/worktrees, parent-reviewed before import, final docs/registries/stamps stay parent-owned, and a delegation outcome metric is recorded.
known_failure_modes: Two agents edit the same file in one loop.
A subagent updates canonical docs, generated registries, or pass receipts without parent integration.
Long-lived subagent branches drift behind the parent branch.
Flutter tests or analyzer are parallelized and fail due toolchain/build-output races.
A patch is accepted without reviewing its pattern_delta.

skills.success_receipt: Website architecture, route contract, component registry, generated listings, static metadata, marketing docs, Storybook coverage, CI path filters, and website build/typecheck proof stay aligned.
known_failure_modes: Public routes change without updating design/website/routes.json.
Static postbuild metadata and hydrated page metadata diverge.
Generated organizer paths drift from the checked route family.
Marketing CI builds after silently rewriting checked-in generated listings.
Component review starts before route ownership and review states are stable.
Storybook route or section stories drift from design/website/components.json.
Website feature code renders native interactive controls instead of shared primitives.
Website feature code recreates or imports the retired website/src/components/site.tsx barrel instead of importing from shared/site, shared/ui/primitives, or feature adapters.

skills.success_receipt: UI change is tied to component contracts or Widgetbook states where relevant and passes focused UI/design checks.
known_failure_modes: Design handoff is implemented by eyeballing instead of contract and Widgetbook state coverage.
New local primitives duplicate existing global concepts.
Text, sizing, or scroll behavior regresses outside the inspected viewport.

skills.success_receipt: Review uses canonical/repair/unify/register/discard decisions and updates contracts, Widgetbook, ledgers, or docs in the same pass.
known_failure_modes: Aliases or feature-only buckets survive as final state.
Widgetbook route or generated directory state is stale.
Design context pack and component contracts drift independently.

skills.success_receipt: Durable guidance is folded into owner docs, duplicate docs are deleted or indexed as temporary, and doc_versions/docs index stay current.
known_failure_modes: New markdown is added where an existing source-of-truth doc should have been updated.
Deleted docs leave stale references.
Temporary trackers remain after durable decisions are migrated.

skills.success_receipt: Schema/rules/model/tooling sources agree, generated contracts are refreshed, and data-contract checks pass or external blockers are documented.
known_failure_modes: Client model nullability diverges from Firestore schema.
Rules tests are run without required emulators.
Backfill or repair tooling is missing for existing data drift.

skills.success_receipt: Local CI-equivalent checks are run, branch/workflow/deploy state is verified when required, and release docs stay current.
known_failure_modes: PR checks are treated as deploy proof.
Local tool manifest drift hides broken release helpers.
Live Firebase/App Store state is assumed without verification.
